name: logic-lens
description: Logic-first code review using semi-formal execution tracing. Surfaces behavioral bugs, type contract breaches, boundary blindspots, and interprocedural semantic mismatches — the logic errors that cause production incidents in syntax-clean code.
author: hyhmrright

commands.description: Logic bug review via execution tracing — find behavioral bugs linters miss
Execution explanation — trace what code actually does, step by step
Semantic diff — verify two code versions are behaviorally equivalent
Fault localization — find the root cause of a failing test or crash
Logic health dashboard — aggregate logic review across a codebase
Autonomous audit-and-fix pipeline — finds and fixes every logic issue without user involvement
